lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਪੂਜਨੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aatamaa raam na poojanee doojai kiau sukh hoe |
lines.english: They do not worship the Lord, the Supreme Soul; how can they find peace in duality?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਹੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਾਢਹਿ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai antar mail hai sabad na kaadteh dhoe |
lines.english: They are filled with the filth of egotism; they do not wash it away with the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਬੋਲੇ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਹਿ ਅਗਨੀ ਕਾ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bole andhule tis meh aganee kaa vaas |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are deaf and blind; they are filled with the fire of desire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੈਲਿਆ ਮੁਏ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਖੋਇ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak bin naavai mailiaa mue janam padaarath khoe |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, they die in their filth; they waste the priceless opportunity of this human life. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਆਪਣੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸੁਧਿ ਨਹੀ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨਿ ਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਿਸਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: onaa aapanee andar sudh nahee gur bachan na kareh visaas |
lines.english: They do not know their own inner being, and they have no faith in the Guru's Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨ ਬੁਝਨੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: baanee surat na bujhanee sabad na kareh pragaas |
lines.english: They have no intuitive understanding of the Guru's Bani; they are not illumined with the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਕੀ ਰਖਦਾ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: har giaaneea kee rakhadaa hau sad balihaaree taas |
lines.english: The Lord saves the honor of the spiritually wise ones.I am forever a sacrifice to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਸਦਾ ਵਿਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaaneea andar gurasabad hai nit har liv sadaa vigaas |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is within the being of the spiritually wise ones. They always blossom in His love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh jo har sevade jan naanak taa kaa daas |21|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is the slave of those Gurmukhs who serve the Lord. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਮੁ ਸਰਪੁ ਹੈ ਜਗੁ ਘੇਰਿਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa bhueiangam sarap hai jag gheriaa bikh maae |
lines.english: The poisonous snake, the serpent of Maya, has surrounded the world with its coils, O mother!

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਗਰੁੜ ਸਬਦੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bikh kaa maaran har naam hai gur garurr sabad mukh paae |
lines.english: The antidote to this poisonous venom is the Name of the Lord; the Guru places the magic spell of the Shabad into the mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਬਿਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਇਆ ਬਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mil satigur niramal hoeaa bikh haumai geaa bilaae |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, they become immaculate, and the poison of egotism is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin satigur miliaa aae |
lines.english: Those who are blessed with such pre-ordained destiny come and meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਦਾ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ਤਿਨ ਜੋ ਚਾਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak sadaa kurabaan tin jo chaaleh satigur bhaae |22|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is forever a sacrifice to those who walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru. ||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਕੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa ke mukh ujale har daragah sobhaa paae |
lines.english: Radiant and bright are the faces of the Gurmukhs; they are honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਤ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh niravair hai nit hiradai har liv laae |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, has no hatred or vengeance. His heart is constantly attuned to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਵੈਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਵੈਰੁ ਰਚਾਇਦਾ ਅਪਣੈ ਘਰਿ ਲੂਕੀ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: niravairai naal vair rachaaeidaa apanai ghar lookee laae |
lines.english: Whoever directs hatred against the Guru, who has no hatred at all, only sets his own home on fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਲੈ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar krodh ahankaar hai anadin jalai sadaa dukh paae |
lines.english: Anger and egotism are within him night and day; he burns, and suffers constant pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਭਰਮਦੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bikh maaeaa kaaran bharamade fir ghar ghar pat gavaae |
lines.english: For the sake of the poison of Maya, they wander from house to house, and lose their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਨਿਤ ਭਉਕਦੇ ਬਿਖੁ ਖਾਧੇ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr bol bol nit bhaukade bikh khaadhe doojai bhaae |
lines.english: They babble and tell lies, and keep on barking, eating the poison of the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਕਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam na chetanee karatai aap khuaae |
lines.english: They do not remember the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; the Creator Himself brings them to ruin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਸੁਆ ਕੇਰੇ ਪੂਤ ਜਿਉ ਪਿਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: besuaa kere poot jiau pitaa naam tis jaae |
lines.english: They are like the son of a prostitute, who does not know the name of his father.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀਅਨੁ ਜਨ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har guramukh kirapaa dhaareean jan vichhurre aap milaae |
lines.english: The Lord showers His Mercy upon the Gurmukhs, and reunites the separated ones with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਾਗੇ ਪਾਇ ॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tis balihaaranai jo satigur laage paae |23|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is a sacrifice to those who fall at the Feet of the True Guru. ||23||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੇ ਸੇ ਊਬਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਜਾਂਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam lage se aoobare bin naavai jam pur jaanhi |
lines.english: Those who are attached to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are saved; without the Name, they must go to the City of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਆਇ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਹਿ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak bin naavai sukh nahee aae ge pachhutaeh |24|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, they find no peace; they come and go in reincarnation with regrets. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿੰਤਾ ਧਾਵਤ ਰਹਿ ਗਏ ਤਾਂ ਮਨਿ ਭਇਆ ਅਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: chintaa dhaavat reh ge taan man bheaa anand |
lines.english: When anxiety and wanderings come to an end, the mind becomes happy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਸੁਤੀ ਨਿਚਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaadee bujheeai saa dhan sutee nichind |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the soul-bride understands, and then she sleeps without worry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tinaa bhettiaa gur govind |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny meet with the Guru, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦੁ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje mil rahe har paaeaa paramaanand |25|
lines.english: O Nanak, they merge intuitively into the Lord, the Embodiment of Supreme Bliss. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan aapanaa gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: Those who serve their True Guru, who contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਲੈਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਖਹਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa bhaanaa man lain har naam rakheh ur dhaar |
lines.english: who honor and obey the Will of the True Guru, who keep the Lord's Name enshrined within their hearts,

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਓਥੈ ਮੰਨੀਅਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aithai othai maneean har naam lage vaapaar |
lines.english: are honored, here and hereafter; they are dedicated to the business of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਿਞਾਪਦੇ ਤਿਤੁ ਸਾਚੈ ਦਰਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sabad siyaapade tith saachai darabaar |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, the Gurmukhs gain recognition in that Court of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਆਪਿ ਬਖਸੇ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jamakaal nerr na aavee aap bakhase karataar |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach them; the Creator Lord Himself forgives them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਉਦਾ ਖਰਚੁ ਸਚੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਿਰਮੁ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saudaa kharach sach antar piram piaar |
lines.english: The True Name is their merchandise, the True Name is their expenditure; the Love of their Beloved fills their inner beings.
